account.sign_in_title: Sign in to manage account details
account.sign_in_desc: This hub can only read verified account and profile fields from the active Supabase session.
account.title: Account / Profile
account.desc: These fields come from your current auth user, profile nickname, and basic account metadata.
account.display_name_hint: Nickname is preferred, then auth metadata, then your email name.
account.email_hint: Read from the active Supabase auth user.
account.joined_hint: Uses the profile created_at value when available, then falls back to auth created_at.
account.read_only: Profile editing is not connected yet in this build. Use support if an account detail needs manual help.

4.title: Shopping K-Beauty 💄
4.desc: Je cherche un partenaire de shopping à Olive Young Myeongdong !

hero.title:
Capturez la beauté de la Corée
dans votre programme
hero.subtitle: Sélectionnez votre service beauté et passez directement à l'étape de réservation.

lookbook_hero.slide2_subtitle: Indiquez votre date, quartier et style.
lookbook_hero.slide3_subtitle: Kello vérifie la disponibilité et le prix avant le paiement.
lookbook_hero.nudge: Votre parcours K-Beauty parfait en Corée — Kello vous accompagne

booking.title: Votre parcours K-Beauty parfait en Corée — Kello vous accompagne
booking.description: Sélectionnez une catégorie pour saisir date, zone et photo de style.

interpreter_page.title: Traducteur en temps réel
interpreter_page.subtitle: Langue client : langue de l'app ; langue boutique : coréen (fixe).
interpreter_page.onboarding: Ce que le client dit est traduit en coréen ; ce que le personnel dit en coréen est traduit dans votre langue.
interpreter_page.customer_recording: Enregistrement du visiteur... cliquez pour arrêter
interpreter_page.staff_recording: Enregistrement du personnel... cliquez pour arrêter
interpreter_page.customer_placeholder: Tapez ce que le visiteur a dit.
interpreter_page.staff_placeholder: Tapez ce que le personnel a dit en coréen.
interpreter_page.voice_supported_hint: Enregistrez avec le micro ou tapez ci-dessous.
interpreter_page.voice_not_supported_hint: Ce navigateur ne supporte pas l'entrée vocale.
interpreter_page.input_required_customer: Saisissez d'abord la phrase du visiteur.
interpreter_page.input_required_staff: Saisissez d'abord la phrase du personnel.
interpreter_page.voice_too_short_error: Parlez un peu plus longtemps s'il vous plaît.

hair.label: Hair
hair.summary: Start booking everything from style changes to quick trims fastest here.

nail.label: Nail
nail.summary: Pick your desired mood and design, then move lightly to the booking step.

esthetic.label: Esthetic
esthetic.summary: Compare shops and book based on your skin condition and treatment goals.

waxing.label: Waxing
waxing.summary: Quickly find shops matching your area and schedule, leading into the booking flow.

makeup.label: Makeup
makeup.summary: Select a makeup service for your event date and start booking immediately.

lash.label: Lash
lash.summary: Connect directly to the menu for everything from natural extensions to volume styling.

selection.empty: Please select a category first. The start booking button will activate after selection.

cta.hint: Explore available beauty services in the next screen based on the selected category.

location_sheet.view_location_desc: Consulter l'emplacement détaillé sur la carte
location_sheet.google_maps_desc: Consulter les itinéraires de transport en commun sur Google Maps

modals.card_title: 📍 Veuillez vous rendre à cette adresse

steps.step1_desc: Choose your treatment and move to the next step.
steps.step2_desc: Enter appointment date and info on one screen.
steps.step3_desc: Review details and send reservation request.

service_selection.title: Select Service
service_selection.desc: Please select the service menu you want.
service_selection.no_menu: No services available for this category yet.

date_time.title: Select Date & Time
date_time.desc: Please choose your preferred appointment time.
date_time.preparing: The date selection screen is being prepared for this category.

customer_details.title: Customer Details
customer_details.desc: Please review your information for booking confirmation.
customer_details.desc_hint: Please enter accurate information for booking confirmation.
customer_details.request_placeholder: Describe your desired style or any specific concerns.
customer_details.current_status_desc: Please attach photos showing your current status.
customer_details.current_status_helper: The clearer the photos, the better the consultation.
customer_details.desired_style_desc: Please attach reference images of the style you want.
customer_details.desired_style_helper: Images that clearly show the desired mood or length are best.
customer_details.photo_hint: * You can attach 1 photo each for reference and current status.
customer_details.preparing: The customer details entry screen is being prepared for this category.

confirmation.title: Booking Summary
confirmation.desc: Please review the information you entered.
confirmation.desc_summary: Please review the information you entered.
confirmation.desc_final: Review the booking once more and send the request.
confirmation.agreement_desc: Please agree to the required items for booking.
confirmation.agreement_desc_hint: Please agree to the required items for booking.
confirmation.confirm_info_desc: I confirm that the selected shop, date, and service details are correct.
confirmation.privacy_desc: I agree to provide my name and contact information to the shop for the reservation.
confirmation.preparing: The final confirmation screen is being prepared for this category.

hair.section_desc: Select hair services like cut, perm, color, or clinic first.
hair.cut_desc: Basic hair cut for styling and length adjustment.
hair.perm_desc: Perm treatment for wave and volume.
hair.color_desc: Root touch-up, full color, or tone change.
hair.clinic_desc: Treatment for damage care and hair recovery.
hair.styling_desc: Dry, event styling, or final touch-ups.

nail.section_desc: Choose your desired nail style and type of care.
nail.care_desc: Basic care for cuticles, shape, and clean finish.
nail.gel_desc: One-color gel nail focusing on durability.
nail.art_desc: Design consultation from simple to detailed art.
nail.ext_desc: Nail extension for length and shape correction.
nail.rem_desc: Removal of existing gel, art, or extensions.

aesthetic.section_desc: Select treatment according to your skin condition and goals.
aesthetic.basic_desc: Basic skin care focusing on cleansing and hydration.
aesthetic.trouble_desc: Care focused on skin troubles and pores.
aesthetic.calming_desc: Calming care for sensitive and red skin.
aesthetic.lifting_desc: Lifting care for elasticity and contour.
aesthetic.bright_desc: Brightening care for dull skin tone.

eyelash.section_desc: Choose from extensions, perms, or care for your lashes.
eyelash.perm_desc: Eyelash perm for lift and eye design.
eyelash.ext_desc: Eyelash extension for length and volume.

makeup.section_desc: Select makeup services for daily, shooting, or wedding.
makeup.interview_desc: Clean and clear lookup for interviews.
makeup.shooting_desc: Makeup for studio or outdoor shooting.
makeup.special_desc: Point makeup for parties or events.

waxing.section_desc: Select waxing services for face, body, or brazilian.
waxing.body_desc: Back, chest, or body part waxing.
